episodes.title: Buried Secrets: Kathleen Cody’s Escape From the "Purity Cult" Graveyard
episodes.description:
Buried Secrets: Kathleen Cody’s Escape From the "Purity Cult" Graveyard

Discover the chilling story of Kathleen Cody and her escape from a high-control "Purity Cult" built atop an ancient burial ground. In this gripping interview, Kathleen reveals the dark secrets of the ranch—a place marketed as a sanctuary that hid a generational cycle of betrayal and spiritual abuse. From the discovery of skeletons in the foundation to the psychological manipulation used to control every resident, this documentary exposes the horrifying intersection of religious trauma and systemic failure. We explore Kathleen’s journey of resilience as she survived the foster care system and broke free from the shadows of a predatory community. This episode sheds light on the mechanics of cult dynamics and the strength required to reclaim one’s identity after years of isolation. Join us for an unfiltered look at survival, healing, and the pursuit of truth against all odds.
